title: Oxygraphis salsuginosus
intro: Oxygraphis salsuginosus, also known as Himalayan Oxygraphis, is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as arthritis, diabetes, and cardiovascular diseases. The bioactive constituents of Oxyraphis salsuginosus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often sold as dietary supplements or used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.

Oxygraphis salsuginosus is a species of flowering plant that is closely related to other plants within the Ranunculaceae family.
